title: Xtra Crunchy Canadian Duck Skewers
description: Crispy Canadian duck skewers featuring duck fat, served with a side of tangy slaw, perfect for a satisfying dinner
instructions: Preheat the fondue pot with duck fat to 375 degrees Fahrenheit
In a shallow dish, mix together flour, cornstarch, salt, and pepper
In a separate dish, beat the eggs
In a third dish, place the panko breadcrumbs
Dip each piece of duck into the flour mixture, then the eggs, and finally the breadcrumbs, coating evenly
Carefully place the coated duck pieces into the preheated fondue pot
Fry the duck skewers for 5-6 minutes, or until golden brown and crispy
Using a slotted spoon, remove the duck skewers from the fondue pot and place on a paper towel lined plate to drain excess oil
In a large bowl, mix together shredded cabbage and grated carrots
Serve the crispy duck skewers with a side of the tangy slaw
